title: Harvest Simplified
description: Auto Harvest and Auto Pickup: With Harvest Simplified, you can use your farm more efficiently and no longer need to collect items and replant crops! Customizable for all available crops.
body:
# Harvest Simplified
### Harvest
![Carrots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2f07aee38ece716b0fe0bf7c921cf2f2426b833.gif)
Harvest Simplified allows you to run your farms more efficiently by automatically replanting harvested crops. You also receive harvested items directly into your inventory.

### Adjust
![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54839d22ac5b20b7b028347e45cc239b37d7b74.gif)
Furthermore, with Harvest Simplified you can directly specify which plants should be affected. New plants and features will be added through future updates.

Please let me know which plants absolutely need to be added!
